subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Blessed art thou, for thou hast perfumed the senses with the sweet fragrance of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی خوشا بحال شما که مشامرا بنفحه خوش رحمانی معطر نمودی و توجه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
